findings.description: Header seal/signature graphic area from the PDF is not preserved in the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: The PDF shows the North Carolina state seal at the top center and a handwritten signature near the closing. In the HTML, these graphics are absent; only text content remains.

findings.description: Text styling and emphasis are not fully preserved.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, names/titles at the top left are blue with italicized role labels, and some values such as acreage figures appear visually emphasized. In the HTML, styling is simplified to plain gray text with reduced visual distinction.

findings.description: Reading order includes stray header text before the main letter content.
findings.evidence: The HTML presents a block of left-margin header text ('ROY COOPER', 'MICHAEL S. REGAN', 'BRIAN WRENN', 'NORTH CAROLINA Environmental Quality') separately before the main dated letter content, whereas in the PDF these items are part of the page header surrounding the seal and not encountered as a standalone preface.
